_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Tip critical or time-sensitive information to appropriate customers.
reference_document_element_description: Ability to select the appropriate analytical method for a given business question, balancing statistical rigor, time constraints, data availability, and audience comprehension capacity.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI AB domain. AB-A-002 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: OP-S-005 (OP, cosine: 0.374), DQ-S-009 (DQ, cosine: 0.371).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.4/10 (raw 0.441). Shared vocabulary: [appropriate, time]. DCWF-only terms [critical, customers, information, sensitive, tip] vs WIDAI-only terms [ability, analytical, audience, availability, balancing, business] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.846 (P=0.852, R=0.840). Balanced P/R — the 8-word DCWF element and 23-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (98.1%). "Tip critical or time-sensitive information to appropriate customers." and "Ability to select the appropriate analytical method for a given business questio" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.379 < STS 0.441 (gap -0.061). Cross-attention finds deeper alignment than independent encoding. The relationship depends on cross-text reasoning — concept-level mapping between [critical, customers, information] and [ability, analytical, audience] that bi-encoders structurally cannot capture.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 10.3%. Shared tokens: [appropriate, time]. DCWF-only: [critical, customers, information, sensitive, tip]. WIDAI-only: [ability, analytical, audience, availability, balancing, business].
